methodology: Each URL was loaded in headless Chromium. Page title and body text were searched for the target asset (GME/GameStop) and the claimed metric. All dashboard metrics are model-derived from CBOE inputs; external links are comparator references for manual cross-verification, not data sources. Status: comparator = external site shows a comparable metric for GME (our value is model-derived); proxy = asset confirmed, metric definition may differ; unsupported = no viable free live source; unverified = bot protection or HTTP error; wrong-asset = page shows different asset.

accepted.page_title: GameStop Corp. (GME) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance
accepted.finding: GME stock price confirmed. Mart spot value is source_native from CBOE underlying_close; Yahoo Finance is a comparator for cross-verification.
GME Max Pain Calculator confirmed with per-expiry breakdown. Mart max pain is model-derived using distinct-candidate cross-join on standard contracts; Maximum-Pain.com is a comparator.

accepted.page_title: GME Put/Call Ratio for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME put/call ratio confirmed. Mart P/C ratio is model-derived (SUM put OI / SUM call OI for DTE >= 7); Barchart may use different filters.

accepted.page_title: GME Gamma Exposure (GEX) for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME GEX confirmed on Barchart. Mart net_gex is model-derived (gamma * OI * 100 * spot^2 * 0.01 * sign); Barchart uses their own GEX formula.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME IV confirmed. Mart iv30 is model-derived (OI-weighted avg for 20-40 DTE window); Barchart definition may differ.

accepted.page_title: GME Gamma Exposure (GEX) for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GEX by strike confirmed. Mart gamma_flip_point is model-derived (zero-crossing of cumulative GEX); Barchart shows raw GEX data.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME historical volatility confirmed. Mart hv20 is model-derived from Yahoo Finance closes; Barchart lookback may differ.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: IV Rank confirmed. Mart iv_rank uses 252-session window; Barchart uses 1-year range.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: IV Percentile visible. Mart uses 252-session observation count; Barchart lookback window may differ.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Prices for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME options chain with per-contract OI confirmed. OI delta is model-derived via LAG.

accepted.page_title: GME Gamma Exposure (GEX) for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GEX confirmed. Mart dealer_net_gamma is model-derived (sum of per-contract GEX); Barchart shows their own aggregate.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Prices for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME options chain with sortable OI per strike confirmed. Mart top OI strikes are model-derived rankings.

unsupported.finding: No free live source matches this mart's aggregation definition. Seed fixture for CI only.
No free live source provides a mention-weighted average sentiment score in the -1 to +1 range matching this mart's definition. Seed fixture for CI only.

unverified.card: ER Cycle Phase / Days to Next ER
unverified.finding: GameStop Investor Relations inaccessible to headless browser. Official public source for GME earnings dates; dates also published in SEC 8-K/10-Q filings on EDGAR.
Cloudflare bot-protection in headless browser. Known public source; manual verification shows IV data for GME. Primary reference is Barchart Volatility & Greeks (verified comparator).

rejected.rejection_reason: wrong-asset: SqueezeMetrics DIX/GEX tracks S&P 500 market-wide gamma exposure only. Page title confirms 'sqzme | Fresh perspectives on stock data' with no GME-specific content. All three prior SqueezeMetrics references (net_gex, gamma_flip_point, dealer_net_gamma) replaced with Barchart Gamma Exposure.
Discussion forum, not a machine-readable or structured data endpoint for social mention counts.
Discussion forum. Cannot provide a mention-weighted average sentiment score. Metric marked unsupported.
Navigation failed: execution context destroyed on redirect. Replaced by maximum-pain.com.
wrong-asset: page shows SPY/S&P 500 content by default, not GME.
Aggregation scope differs from mart fixture definition. Social metrics reclassified as unsupported; no free live source matches mart definition.
